Package neqsim.process.safety.scenario

Enum Class ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseCase

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseCase>
neqsim.process.safety.scenario.ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseCase
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseCase>, Constable
Enclosing class:
ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
public static enum ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseCase extends Enum<ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseCase>
Built-in release cases for industrial screening taxonomies.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    CONFIGURED
    Single configured leak case using the generator hole diameter.
    DROPPED_OBJECT_DAMAGE
    Dropped-object damage screening case.
    FIFTY_MM_HOLE
    Fifty millimetre process leak.
    FIVE_MM_HOLE
    Five millimetre process leak.
    FLANGE_LEAK
    Flange leak screening case.
    FULL_BORE_RUPTURE
    Full-bore rupture using the configured full-bore diameter.
    INSTRUMENT_LEAK
    Instrument connection leak screening case.
    TEN_MM_HOLE
    Ten millimetre process leak.
    TWENTY_FIVE_MM_HOLE
    Twenty-five millimetre process leak.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReleaseCase

      private ReleaseCase(String caseName, String category, double holeDiameterM, double screeningFrequencyPerYear, String description)
      Creates a release case.
      Parameters:
      caseName - readable case name
      category - case category
      holeDiameterM - representative hole diameter in m
      screeningFrequencyPerYear - generic screening frequency in 1/year
      description - case description

    • valueOf

      public static ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseCase valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
